loading.description: Loading current user, tenant context, and capability switches.

roles.description: Tenant roles such as admin, member, and readonly

quotas.label: Usage Quotas
quotas.description: Resource progress for API calls, storage, and more

security.label: Security Settings
security.description: Login logs, device management, and future controls

tenantSettings.label: Tenant Settings
tenantSettings.description: Language, timezone, and dangerous tenant cancellation

brief.title: Working brief
brief.description: Keep this panel compact and actionable instead of turning it into a second dashboard.

items.focus: Track the one or two changes most likely to move the current page forward.
items.owners: Keep owners and follow-up items visible when the main content is dense.
items.followUp: Use the panel as a launch point for quick summaries, not permanent clutter.

composer.title: Prompt draft
composer.placeholder: Type a question, instruction, or draft for "{page}"...
composer.hint: This keeps the framework ready before wiring the real assistant request flow.

hero.title: Sign in to the Vxture console.
hero.description: Access platform operations, tenant management, and capability-scoped modules from one controlled entry point.

card.title: Sign in
card.description: Use your account to continue to the workspace.

form.acceptPrefix: I have read and agree to the

errors.terms: Please agree to the User Agreement and Privacy Policy first.
errors.invalid: Unable to sign in with the current credentials.
errors.unavailable: The console login service is unavailable. Start console-bff first.

dashboard.title: Workspace command center
dashboard.description: A restrained control surface for subscription health, quota pressure, and access posture across the active tenant.

plan.label: Current plan
plan.hint: Renews on May 18, 2026 with pooled workspace billing.

quota.label: Quota health
quota.hint: Inference remains healthy, but GPU tuning is approaching alert range.

reminders.label: Open reminders
reminders.hint: One invoice, one invite, and one quota threshold need review.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Guide frequent workspace operations without flooding the page with primary buttons.

addMember.label: Add member
addMember.description: Invite operators, workspace owners, and readonly reviewers.

reviewSubscription.label: Review subscription
reviewSubscription.description: Inspect plan details, renewal timing, and quota pool pressure.

adjustQuotas.label: Adjust quotas
adjustQuotas.description: Rebalance shared limits before overage costs increase.

signals.title: Signals
signals.description: Keep the dashboard concise: only what needs attention now.

billing.title: Billing follow-up
billing.description: An invoice for model overage is due within 5 days.

quota.title: Quota hotspot
quota.description: Fine-tune GPU hours are nearing the configured monthly cap.

access.title: Access hygiene
access.description: Two invited members have not accepted access yet.

invoices.title: Recent invoices
invoices.description: Subscription and overage charges stay secondary to plan status.

quotas.title: Quota posture
quotas.description: Usage remains visible, but not as an oversized ops dashboard.

settings.title: Tenant settings
settings.description: Settings use clearly separated cards and restrained form density instead of a long uninterrupted form wall.

workspace.title: Workspace profile
workspace.description: Public workspace labels, locale, and administrative contacts.
workspace.name: Workspace name

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Keep toggle controls grouped and visually quiet.

billing.title: Billing reminders
billing.description: Notify finance owners before renewal or overdue invoices.

quota.title: Quota alerts
quota.description: Send alerts when shared pools cross configured thresholds.

approvals.title: New member approvals
approvals.description: Notify workspace owners when access requests need review.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.description: These actions affect the current tenant and require explicit confirmation.

cancelTenant.title: Cancel tenant
cancelTenant.description: Tenant cancellation enters a guarded confirmation flow and later requires entering the tenant name.
cancelTenant.confirmHint: Requires secondary confirmation and the current tenant name before execution.

header.title: Members
header.description: Invite, review, and govern tenant operators with a lower-noise member management surface.

ownerCoverage.title: Owner coverage
ownerCoverage.description: Two primary owners are active this week, keeping tenant-critical approvals covered.

pendingOnboarding.title: Pending onboarding
pendingOnboarding.description: Three invitations are older than 72 hours and should be nudged or revoked.

securityReview.title: Security review
securityReview.description: One suspended analyst still has historical billing exports attached to their profile.

accessPosture.title: Access posture
accessPosture.description: Lead with operational signals before dropping into the full member directory.

nextActions.title: Next actions
nextActions.description: Keep repetitive administration visible without turning the page into a tool menu.

table.title: Workspace members
table.description: Keep the directory focused on the fields operators actually scan, and push everything else into the detail drawer.
table.toolbarHint: Search, filter, then open the drawer for contextual actions.
table.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or role

empty.loadingDescription: Reading workspace members from the console BFF.
empty.title: No members match the current filters.
empty.description: Try widening the status scope or searching by another field.

accessSummary.title: Access summary
accessSummary.description: {name} currently operates in the {team} group with scoped console permissions.

followUp.title: Suggested follow-up
followUp.invited: Confirm invitation acceptance or resend access instructions.
followUp.suspended: Review audit history before restoring workspace access.
followUp.active: Review role scope before expanding access to billing or tenant settings.

header.title: Roles & permissions
header.description: Manage real tenant roles and permissions from the database with a simplified page layout.

list.title: Role list
list.description: Show role name, status, and permission count first, then open details only when needed.

detail.title: Role details
detail.description: Review the current role definition and its bound permissions.
detail.permissionsDescription: Permission codes currently bound to this role.

dialog.permissionsDescription: Click tags to toggle permission bindings.

empty.loadingDescription: Reading tenant roles and permissions from the console BFF.
empty.title: No roles found for this tenant.
empty.description: Create a role first, then continue configuring permissions.
